base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of samus_suitless_idle_walk — a character (playable) from 1986 metroid. Samus in Justin-Bailey / suitless mode — pink leotard + long orange hair (or green-swimsuit/bikini variants). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Samus in Justin-Bailey / suitless mode — pink leotard + long orange hair (or green-swimsuit/bikini variants); 3-frame walk cycle. Unlocked by password 'JUSTIN BAILEY' or by beating game under 1 hour
